label: Improvements
items: Plant database search — AI suggestions now show thumbnails (Wikipedia / Pixabay / Unsplash) instead of blank placeholders. The first user to look up a plant pays the lookup cost; everyone else gets it from a shared 90-day server cache, so results paint almost instantly.

Plant database search — Perenual results now page 10 at a time. "Show more" reveals the next ten from the current batch, then fetches the next page from Perenual when you run out — matches the Shed search rhythm.
Plant database search — your last search is remembered on the device, so reopening the modal restores the results instantly with no network round-trip.
